claim_to_test: Whether PR44's 12M->11M->10M->9M sequence is range, object size, gate size, zoom state, or another display parameter
required_source_data: sensor/display symbology documentation; track-box label dictionary; operator-display manual; native overlay layer metadata
why_needed: The visible label is persistent and value-changing, but public pixels do not define the label semantics.
promotion_condition: The label definition is documented by source-system material or native metadata and distinguishes range/object-size/gate/zoom/display-state meanings.

claim_to_test: Whether PR44 label changes can be tied to object motion, sensor track state, or platform/sensor geometry
required_source_data: original uncompressed video; frame metadata; FOV/zoom state; slant range or range-time series; platform position/attitude; gimbal pointing/stabilization state
why_needed: The public MP4 supports image-plane display association but not physical reconstruction.
promotion_condition: Raw video and synchronized telemetry allow independent reconstruction of label behavior relative to sensor/platform state.

claim_to_test: Whether PR051's repeated 5M/5m-style label and reticle-lock values are object size, range, gate size, zoom state, or another display parameter
required_source_data: sensor/display symbology documentation; native overlay metadata; track-box/reticle label dictionary; original frame metadata
why_needed: The 5M/5m-style label appears repeatedly in the public MP4, but semantics are unresolved.
promotion_condition: Source-system documentation or native metadata defines the label and distinguishes original-excerpt 5M labels from reticle-lock values.

claim_to_test: Whether PR051 altered/replayed intervals preserve native overlay timing and whether the exit sequence supports physical motion inference
required_source_data: original unaltered sensor video; uploader/editor chain of custody; edit decision list if available; raw 2021 source clip; classified-network upload metadata
why_needed: DVIDS says the media was digitally altered before upload and describes the key exit as sensor tracking stopping.
promotion_condition: The original source clip and chain-of-custody establish which frames are native, replayed, altered, thresholded, zoomed, or post-produced.

claim_to_test: Whether PR059's changing target-adjacent M/m-style label is range, object size, gate size, zoom state, track quality, or another display parameter
required_source_data: sensor/display symbology documentation; native overlay metadata; track-box label dictionary; original frame metadata; platform/sensor metadata synchronized to the public interval
why_needed: The public MP4 shows a persistent changing M/m-style label near the tracked target, but public pixels do not define the label semantics.
promotion_condition: Source-system documentation or native metadata defines the PR059 label and distinguishes physical range/size from display-state or track-gate meanings.

cases: PR31; PR32; PR33; PR34; PR36; PR45
claim_to_test: Whether absence of PR44-style labels in controls reflects true display behavior or current crop/detector limits
required_source_data: sensor family documentation; display examples from conventional/benign clips; control videos with known aircraft/glare/reticle states
why_needed: The negative controls are bounded to the current PR44-style crop/detector geometry.
promotion_condition: Known-label control examples define false-negative behavior for the detector and show how labels appear across reticle/display modes.
